case_title: MUKUNA, OLGA VS RAMIREZ, HERCULANO DBA RAMIREZ TOW TRUCK et al

docket_entries.description: WRITTEN STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES REGARDING SETTLEMENT OF CASE. COPY SENT TO THE SHERIFF AS A WRIT HAS ALREADY BEEN ISSUED.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,800.00 FILED BY MUKUNA, OLGA AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, HERCULANO DBA RAMIREZ TOW TRUCK RAMIREZ, HERCULANO DBA HERCULES TIRES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-23-2005 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED. PROCESS SERVER'S NAME WAS PUT IN LIEU OF THE DEFENDANT'S NAME.
2ND PROOF OF SERVICE FILED. PROCESS SERVER'S NAME WAS PUT IN LIEU OF THE DEFT'S NAME.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MUKUNA, OLGA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, HERCULANO DBA RAMIREZ TOW TRUCK RAMIREZ, HERCULANO DBA HERCULES TIRES $2,400.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,400.00, DEFT WAIVES DEFECTIVE SERVICE. THE CONTRACT BETWEEN THE PLAINTIFF AND THE DEFENDANT IS HEREBY RESCINDED FOR THE 1991 CHEVY BLAZER, VIN #1GNDTL3Z5M2L29829 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, HERCULANO DBA RAMIREZ TOW TRUCK RAMIREZ, HERCULANO DBA HERCULES TIRES
